name: Honeyed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken pieces with lemon.
2. Sprinkle with half of the ginger and salt.
3. Combine oil, honey, and remaining ginger in a bowl.
4. Brush the chicken with the honey mixture.
5. Roast in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 1.5 to 2 hours, basting occasionally with the honey mixture.
